title: Four years after invading Ukraine, Russia sinks deeper into authoritarianism and repression
subhead: Since 2022, Vladimir Putin's regime has hardened relentlessly. The war has gone hand in hand with increasingly harsh control over society, all against a backdrop of mounting economic difficulties.

title: Iran says an 'unprecedented' deal is 'within reach' ahead of US talks
'The US Supreme Court decision on tariffs helps dispel the image of an institution that has become entirely subservient to the president'
Germany is being forced to confront its growing competition with China
subhead: German Chancellor Friedriz Merz is traveling to China on February 25 and 26 amid significant economic tension. China, once the driving force behind German exports, has become a direct rival, forcing Berlin to rethink its industrial policy.

title: 'Who could have imagined that the federal agency for workplace equality would one day accuse Coca-Cola of anti-male segregation?'
subhead: A subcontractor for the American soft drink giant is facing legal action after hosting a 2024 networking event exclusively for 250 women. The federal equal opportunity commission is now reasserting what Le Monde economy journalist Isabelle Chaperon calls the law of the jungle.

title: Cristel, the high-end cookware specialist, to open a second production site
subhead: Defying the trend among many French manufacturers, this company based in Doubs, northeastern France, is facing soaring demand.

title: Who will replace Mexican druglord 'El Mencho'?
subhead: After the army killed on Sunday the leader of Mexico's most powerful cartel, David Mora, a researcher at the International Crisis Group, expresses concern about the violence that could result from divisions within the criminal group and from the ambitions of rival cartels.

Lyon drug traffickers hire Colombian hitmen to kill their rivals
subhead: Criminal cases involving Colombian nationals have become increasingly common in the Lyon area. According to the police, these individuals are believed to be mercenaries hired by French drug trafficking kingpins to terrorize or eliminate their rivals.

title: With expected US retreat, Germany seeks to strengthen its role within NATO
subhead: Berlin has invested hundreds of billions of euros to rearm since Russia's invasion of Ukraine in 2022 and aims to play a major role within the North Atlantic Alliance, particularly as the US moves toward isolation.

title: Dark Bank: American suspected of leading an international criminal organization extradited to France
subhead: Huzefa Hafiz Ismail arrived on French soil on Friday. He was arrested in August 2024 in Texas at the request of French judicial authorities, who suspect him of leading a vast money laundering network.
